[15_0_X][L1T] CALO-L2 calibrations and cons. ZS for first L1 menu 2025
HLT menu development for `15_0_X` (4/N)
[15_0_X] Backport of #47801 (Add the Scouting Glo-ParT inference facility)
[15.0.X] Fix  `siPixelDigiMorphing` modifer and create workflows to test it
[15.0.X] add `DQMEventInfo` instance to the sequence run `OfflineHLTMonitoring`
[15_0_X] Plugin to obtain the best track index for Run3ScoutingElectron
[15.0.X] backport: PPS DQM update for the beginning of 2025 data-taking
[15_0_X] Add customization for the SerialSync tracking sequence in the mkFit HLT customizer
Introducing a NGT DQM instance for the monitoring of scouting collection [15_0_X]
no delay read when runing PAT or NANO by itself [150X]
[15.0] Fix missing `CaloParticle`s from pileup
Restore branchless 'and' operations [15_0_X]
[15_0_X] Update TkAl PCL metadata for 2025
[15_0_X] Backport of #47739 (Add filter to skip events without scouting objects in ScoutingNano for ScoutingPFMonitor dataset)
btvNano: store all PS weights [150X]
kt smearing for gammaUPC [15_0_X]
[15_0_X] Add a log message for URLs the XrdAdaptor opens
15_0_X Backport: Make ReserveDMu skim throw exception upon mismatch in requested trigg
[15_0_X] Fix the AlCaRecoTriggerBits/SecondaryDataset tag for the first IOVs in Run2 and Run3 data GT
